usd_reason: The dollar is rising because investors think US interest rates will go up
gold_reason: Higher US interest rates make gold less attractive to investors
indices_reason: Stock market investors are waiting to see what the Fed's new leader will do
lead_story: The US dollar is at a one-year high because investors think the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates, which makes the dollar more attractive to investors. This is happening after the Fed's new leader, Kevin Warsh, had his first meeting. The stronger dollar could affect many parts of the economy, including trade and investment.
